app.name: RuoYi-Vue3 Admin Console
app.one_liner: A modern, responsive admin console built with Vue3, Vite, and Element Plus, serving as the official frontend for the RuoYi Java backend.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display system overview, navigation menu, and quick access to core administrative functions.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist configuration or entity updates to the backend via REST API.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic dashboard layout with sidebar navigation
week 1: Set up Vue3 + Vite project structure with Element Plus
acceptance_tests: Dashboard loads role-based menu items correctly
User can log in and be redirected to the dashboard
